form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 4th on April 7 over 400m at Bulli behind Creeping Tiger beaten 7 lengths (22.99) in a Grade 5. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 320m at this track behind Destiny Our Girl beaten 6 lengths (18.78). Looks a strong winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On entering the home straight raced tightly and came together.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, filling the minors at his last four starts, the latest when second (22.80) at this track. Has a low draw. Worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the first turn came together; In the back straight hampered.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won comfortably by 3.5 lengths at Gosford (22.38) beating Miss Bansky in a Grade 5 on March 17. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. Last start finished fourth over 401m at this track, beaten 8 lengths. Happy enough to avoid.

form.formComment: Has been in the money the last two runs. Finished third at this track in 23.17 last time but the start prior clocked a fast 22.82 over 401m finishing second at this track. Warrants respect on latest.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 401m. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on February 7 over 400m at Dubbo behind Julie Keeping beaten 8 lengths (23.43). This appears within her reach.
